div1.entryFree: Lucius, name of 1) L. Tarquinius: Lucr. Arg. Rom. I, 2, 73 2) a son of Titus Andronicus': Tit. I. 282 etc. 3) a lord in Tim. I, 2, 187 etc. (his servant assuming his name in III, 4, 2). 4) L. Pella: Caes. IV, 3, 2. 5) a servant of Brutus: Caes. II, 1, 1 etc. 6) the brother of Antony: Ant. I, 2, 94. 7) the Roman ambassador in Cymb. II, 3, 60 etc.
